# AIVision

> AIVision is a Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) consultancy helping brands remain visible, cited, and recommended in AI answer engines such as ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity as traditional search traffic declines.  
> We serve global AI-native brands, with operational presence across Africa and North America.

---

## Key Links

- 🌐 Waitlist (Exclusive GEO Beta Cohort – 50 Businesses): https://yourdomain.com/
- 💻 GitHub Repository: https://github.com/yourusername/aivision-waitlist

---

## Core Services

### 🛡️ AI Citability Audits
Analyze how frequently and accurately Large Language Models (LLMs) cite your brand as a primary source when generating answers.

### 🚀 Recommendation Lift
Optimize your digital footprint so your product or service is recommended when users ask AI engines “What is the best…?”

### 📊 Sentiment Guard
Monitor and mitigate hallucinated risks, misinformation, or negative AI-generated summaries about your brand.

---

## Regional Presence

AIVision supports growth-stage and AI-native companies across:

- West Africa (Abidjan, Lagos, Accra)
- North America
- Remote-first global SaaS teams

We help emerging-market companies compete in AI answer engines globally.

---

## Industry Context

- Gartner predicts a 50% decline in traditional search traffic by 2028.
- AI-native answer engines are replacing traditional search as the primary discovery layer.
- Brands not optimized for AI citation risk disappearing from digital consideration.

---

## GEO Definition

Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is the practice of optimizing a brand’s structured content, authority signals, and digital footprint to ensure accurate representation, citation, and recommendation within AI-generated answers.

---

## Status

Beta Cohort — Limited to 50 Businesses
